prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-GEOKIT-MUSS-BAG-PZ-KIT Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 38pc Deluxe Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Carry Bag Description: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field. From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered.

A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material.

Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily. Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck. Search Terms: geology tools university gem books supplies rockhounding tool for adults kids carry nylon bag totes gold rush nuggets equipment pans pay dirt rocks and gems mining and supplies camping essentials supplies Features: - DELUXE ROCKHOUNDING TOOLS KIT: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered - ESSENTIAL ROCK PICK: A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material - SPECIMEN MAT: Included for identifying, measuring, cataloging and photograhing found rocks, fossils, gems or other valuable material; 9 x 12 inch double sided specimen mat features both inch and millimeter mesaurements - DELUXE NYLON TOTE BAG: The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily - ROCKHOUNDING TOOLS: Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
